title: Building the App Store for Agentic Engineering
summary: Cole Medin is building a workflow marketplace for Archon, a platform for agentic engineering. The marketplace enables users to install, share, and reuse battle-tested AI coding workflows defined in YAML that run in isolated git worktrees across different model providers.
